where.if: AND ( board_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') )

mapper.select: SELECT id, board_key, name, description, is_enabled, is_public_read, is_public_write, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM boards ORDER BY is_enabled DESC, sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, board_key, name, description, is_enabled, is_public_read, is_public_write, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM boards
ORDER BY is_enabled DESC, sort_order ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, board_key, name, description, is_enabled, is_public_read, is_public_write, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM boards WHERE is_enabled = 1 AND is_public_read = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, board_key, name, description, is_enabled, is_public_read, is_public_write, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM boards WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, board_key, name, description, is_enabled, is_public_read, is_public_write, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM boards WHERE board_key = #{boardKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO boards ( board_key, name, description, is_enabled, is_public_read, is_public_write, sort_order, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{boardKey}, #{name}, #{description}, #{isEnabled}, #{isPublicRead}, #{isPublicWrite}, #{sortOrder}, NOW(6), NOW(6) )
mapper.update: UPDATE boards SET board_key = #{boardKey}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, is_public_read = #{isPublicRead}, is_public_write = #{isPublicWrite}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{id}
